q: 2001年の売上合計金額はいくらですか
sql:
SELECT SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) AS TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT_2001
FROM SH.SALES s
JOIN SH.TIMES t
  ON s.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
WHERE t.CALENDAR_YEAR = 2001

q: 販売チャネルごとの売上合計を教えてください
sql:
SELECT
    c.CHANNEL_DESC,
    SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) AS TOTAL_SALES
FROM
    SH.SALES s
JOIN
    SH.CHANNELS c
ON
    s.CHANNEL_ID = c.CHANNEL_ID
GROUP BY
    c.CHANNEL_DESC

q: 売上金額が最も多い商品カテゴリの上位3件は何ですか
sql:
SELECT p.PROD_CATEGORY_DESC AS CATEGORY,
       SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD)       AS TOTAL_SALES
FROM   SH.SALES   s
JOIN   SH.PRODUCTS p
  ON   s.PROD_ID = p.PROD_ID
GROUP BY p.PROD_CATEGORY_DESC
ORDER BY SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) DESC
FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

q: 顧客数が多い国の上位5件を教えてください
sql:
SELECT c.COUNTRY_NAME,
       COUNT(*) AS CUSTOMER_COUNT
FROM SH.CUSTOMERS cust
JOIN SH.COUNTRIES c
  ON cust.COUNTRY_ID = c.COUNTRY_ID
GROUP BY c.COUNTRY_NAME
ORDER BY CUSTOMER_COUNT DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

q: 1999年に売上金額が最も大きかった商品トップ5は
sql:
SELECT p.PROD_ID,
       p.PROD_NAME,
       SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT_SOLD
FROM   SH.SALES s
JOIN   SH.TIMES t
       ON s.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
JOIN   SH.PRODUCTS p
       ON s.PROD_ID = p.PROD_ID
WHERE  t.CALENDAR_YEAR = 1999
GROUP BY p.PROD_ID, p.PROD_NAME
ORDER BY TOTAL_AMOUNT_SOLD DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

rows: Mini DV Camcorder with 3.5" Swivel LCD

q: 2001年の月別売上推移を見せてください
sql:
SELECT t.CALENDAR_MONTH_DESC AS MONTH,
       SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD)       AS TOTAL_AMOUNT_SOLD
FROM   SH.SALES  s
JOIN   SH.TIMES  t
ON     s.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
WHERE  t.CALENDAR_YEAR = 2001
GROUP BY t.CALENDAR_MONTH_DESC

q: プロモーション別の売上合計の上位5件は
sql:
SELECT
    p.PROMO_ID,
    p.PROMO_NAME,
    SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) AS TOTAL_SALES
FROM
    SH.SALES s
JOIN
    SH.PROMOTIONS p
ON
    s.PROMO_ID = p.PROMO_ID
GROUP BY
    p.PROMO_ID,
    p.PROMO_NAME
ORDER BY
    TOTAL_SALES DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

q: 平均販売単価が最も高い商品はどれですか
sql:
SELECT
    p.prod_id,
    p.prod_name,
    AVG(s.amount_sold / s.quantity_sold) AS avg_selling_price
FROM
    sh.sales s
JOIN
    sh.products p
    ON p.prod_id = s.prod_id
GROUP BY
    p.prod_id,
    p.prod_name
ORDER BY
    avg_selling_price DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

q: 2001年で売上が最大だった四半期はいつですか
sql:
SELECT CALENDAR_QUARTER_DESC
FROM (
    SELECT t.CALENDAR_QUARTER_DESC,
           SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) AS total_sales,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) DESC) AS rn
    FROM SH.SALES s
    JOIN SH.TIMES t ON s.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
    WHERE t.CALENDAR_YEAR = 2001
    GROUP BY t.CALENDAR_QUARTER_DESC
)
WHERE rn = 1

q: インターネットチャネルでの2000年の売上合計はいくらですか
sql:
SELECT SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) AS total_sales_amount
FROM SH.SALES s
JOIN SH.CHANNELS c ON s.CHANNEL_ID = c.CHANNEL_ID
JOIN SH.TIMES t ON s.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
WHERE UPPER(c.CHANNEL_DESC) = UPPER('Internet')
  AND t.CALENDAR_YEAR = 2000
